working_on: ADR collection (closes Phase 0): adr/README.md + ADRs 0001-0012 absorbing the 12 strong working commitments + ADRs 0013-0022 absorbing the 10 architectural decisions from design-reasoning.md. Update MISSION.md commitment list with ADR cross-refs; update CROSS_REFERENCES.md Phase 0→Phase 1 boundary check. Final scrub: retire design-reasoning.md.
outcome_summary: Phase 0 closed. 22 ADRs landed in adr/ (all Status: Accepted), authored at production quality (~500-800 words each, dense cross-reference graph), with adr/README.md indexing the collection and pointing at docs/operations/adr-authoring.md for full Nygard guidance. ADRs 0001-0012 absorb the 12 strong working commitments; ADRs 0013-0022 absorb 8 entries from the now-retired design-reasoning.md plus 2 decisions from the S-0001 plan conversation (0016 graph-construction-validation, 0022 periodic-health-checks). docs/MISSION.md commitment list carries inline ADR cross-refs; docs/CROSS_REFERENCES.md Phase 0→Phase 1 boundary check marked verified-at-S-0003-close with the full ADR-mapping audit recorded inline. tools/validate.py adr_status regex widened to accept the documented Nygard bold form (the original regex would have produced 22 false-positive soft-warns against the canonical template); 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns at session close. design-reasoning.md retired (git rm). Decision narrative captured in MemPalace at wing=paideia, room=s0003-adr-collection (drawer_paideia_s0003-adr-collection_bb10001cc414a727cfac7077). Next: S-0004 prompt-pack Session 9 (Engagement Depth Aggregation) opens Phase 1.
